title: Topic Modeling
content:
# Interview Prep: Topic Modeling

## Q1: Explain why the Dirichlet distribution is used as a prior for the multinomial distribution in LDA.

### Standard Answer
The Dirichlet distribution is the **conjugate prior** of the multinomial distribution. This means that if the prior distribution of a variable is Dirichlet and the likelihood is multinomial, the posterior distribution is also a Dirichlet distribution. This property allows us to compute posterior distributions analytically, simplifying parameter estimation in algorithms like Gibbs sampling.
